message:
fix(done): use explicit refspec to push polecat branch, not to main

Polecat branches track origin/main, so 'git push origin <branch>' follows
the tracking config and sends commits to main directly. Use explicit
refspec 'branch:branch' to create the feature branch on remote instead.
This is the true G20 root cause — the formula git push was a symptom.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
